style.name: hand-painted-storybook
style.notes: Soft brushwork, no hard outlines, light from upper-left, ¾ top-down camera.

assets.prompt: Top-down hand-painted illustration of a small woodland stream meandering diagonally from upper center down to the lower right, ¾ overhead angle, Studio-Ghibli storybook style. Mossy banks of grass and earth flank the stream. Wet stream bed soft blue with rounded river stones underwater. Decorative props at edges only: yellow buttercups upper-left, fallen pine log + pinecones on left bank, fallen log entering from upper right, two orange-capped mushrooms on right bank, scattered small leaves and pebbles along bank edges. Empty grass area in the bottom-left and bottom-right corners reserved for UI. The dam-building band across the middle of the stream MUST be left empty between y=420 and y=620. Soft warm lighting from upper-left, painterly edges, no outlines, no text.
constraints: Stream centerline must follow STREAM.path in src/state.js.
Build band y=420..620 must be empty (no painted props).
Bottom-left ~480x170 and bottom-right ~230x230 should be calm grass.

assets.prompt: Pure black-and-white mask the same size as the background. White = wet stream area, black = bank. Soft 8 px feathered edges.

Tan parchment-and-leather inventory bar from above. Tan center (#e6d4a6), darker stitched border (#9a7a48), subtle rope/twine outline. Empty interior. Slight aged paper texture, warm shadow underneath baked into the alpha. No text.

Small weathered cream paper (#efe4c2) tilted 6°, with a beige washi tape across the top. Hand-drawn brown ink doodle of a stream with a row of pebbles forming a dam. No readable text (game overlays 'Level 1' at runtime).
Rounded-rectangle dark wood-bark colored speech bubble (#2a1f15 with subtle texture), soft drop shadow, no tail, no text.
Stylized white pointing-hand cursor (index finger up-right), simple cartoon outline filled white, slight grey shadow.

Weathered wooden twig/short log lying horizontally, painterly art style. Light bark texture (#7e5a36 highlights, #4a2f1c shadow), tapered rounded ends, slight knotty bumps, subtle wet sheen along top. Long axis horizontal, centered.
Single rounded river stone from above, dark grey with mottled texture (#3c3933 to #7a7468), soft top-left highlight, smooth organic oval shape.

Single fresh green broadleaf (poplar/birch shape) from above, long axis horizontal, mid-vein and faint side veins, gradient deep green (#3f6d2c) at stem to bright green (#86b25a) at tip, subtle wet highlight.
Same as piece-stick but framed centered for a 110×90 inventory slot.
Same as piece-pebble but framed centered for a 110×90 inventory slot.
Same as piece-leaf but framed centered for a 110×90 inventory slot.
Sprite sheet of 4 frames of white water foam splash, top-down, increasing in size left-to-right. Each frame 64×96.
